title: Container
description: Represents a Google Tag Manager Container, which is a collection of tags, triggers, and variables used on a website or mobile app.

containerId.description: The Container ID uniquely identifies the GTM Container.

domainName.description: List of domain names associated with the Container. This is used for auto-event tracking and link decoration.

tagIds.description: All Tag IDs that refer to this Container.

usageContext.description: List of Usage Contexts for the Container. Valid values include web, android, ios, and server.

fingerprint.description: The fingerprint of the GTM Container as computed at storage time. This value is recomputed whenever the container is modified.

tagManagerUrl.description: Auto-generated link to the tag manager UI.

taggingServerUrls.description: List of server-side container URLs for the Container.
